Post Purchase - $15 off your order of $50+

important: There is a scam website that customers are texting in from (https://heydudestores.com/)
If you notice this, reroute customers to the correct website!
send_to_cs: Don't ESC post-purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
templates: For wrong items received use WMP shortcut
For damaged items received use DMI shortcut
For order status requests use OSR shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code is valid for first-time customers only.
➜ Can't be combined with any other discounts or offers, including sale styles
➜  Use cww temp for code issues
The promotional price shown on the Heydude website may not always be guaranteed when cx is redirected to Prime for purchase if the item is out of stock

conversation.message_text: HEYDUDE: Welcome to HEYDUDE! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/o76

HEYDUDE: Hey, dude! We're so stoked you're here. Get 15% off your first purchase with code ATT15C-qj2em64j9g5t at checkout. 

Have a question? Reply here anytime!

https://heydudeshoes.attn.tv/aRJd8nrL8inm 
*Full Price Styles only. Additional exclusions may apply.
This code is saying that it is not valid for what is in my cart. I have Wally Margaritaville shoes in my cart. Why is this not working?

HEYDUDE: The coupon code ATT15C-qj2em64j9g5t should be valid. Please ensure you entered it correctly. If the issue persists, please share a screenshot. You can use the coupon on our website: heydudeshoesusa.com.
Still not working

HEYDUDE: Thank you, and really sorry but that item is excluded from any discounts as it's a new arrival. All items that are marked as new arrivals are excluded from all discounts. Sorry for the confusion. 

Please note that discount codes are valid on select styles only. The discount excludes all licensed products: https://heydudeshoes.attn.tv/aZA3yQXZRMuC Doorbusters: https://heydudeshoes.attn.tv/aXMnz5gPxmoD, new arrivals, back in stock and final sale items. They cannot be combined with any other offer or promotion.
So there are no discounts for new arrivals????
HEYDUDE: Unfortunately, new arrivals are not included in the promotional offers. So sorry about that. You can check our sale items here instead: https://heydudeshoes.attn.tv/agp1qKy1nCiZ
Thank you!
HEYDUDE: You're welcome! Have a great day!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

I still have not received my package

Fashion Nova: Thank you for clarifying, and I'm sorry for any confusion. Upon checking, order #159200465 was delivered on 05/22. If the tracking information indicates that your items have been delivered to the address provided on the purchase but you have not received it, please check surrounding houses, doorsteps, etc.. in case another home received it by mistake. Speak with any other tenants such as family, roommates or landlords, etc. in the event they received it on your behalf. The package may also have been left with property managers, an apartment office or your local postal provider. Let me know how that goes!
